meaning: to be fun; to be funny; to be interesting

expressions.english: to be not funny; to be uninteresting; to be boring
expressions.notes: 재미없다 = to be not funny; to be not interesting; to be boring

뭐 = what; something
뭐 is the contracted form of 무엇.

expressions.english: Do you enjoy what you do now?

expressions.korean: 그 사람 진짜 재미있는 것 같아요.
expressions.english: I think he is really funny.
If it's not interesting, you can just not watch it.
expressions.notes:
그냥 = just, only, simply
-(으)면 되다 = to be just supposed to + V; to just have to + V; can just + V

한국어 = the Korean language
공부 = studies; one's learning
정말 = really; very

expressions.korean: 지난 주에 진짜 재미있는 일이 있었어요.
expressions.english: Last week, something really funny happened.

expressions.korean: 너무 재미있어서 집에 오고 싶지 않았어요.
expressions.english: I was having so much fun that I didn't want to come home.

expressions.korean: 그 영화 보고 나서 재미있는지 말해 주세요.
expressions.english: After you see that movie, tell me if it is interesting.
expressions.notes:
-고 나서 = after + V-ing
-는지 = whether or not
말하다 = to talk; to say; to speak; to tell

expressions.korean: 영화가 너무 재미없어서 보다가 잠이 들어 버렸어요.
expressions.english: The movie was so boring that I fell asleep while I was watching it.

expressions.korean: 그 수업은 별로 추천하고 싶지 않아요. 진짜 재미없거든요.
expressions.english: I don't really want to recommend that class. It's really boring.
expressions.notes:
수업 = class
별로 = not particularly, not very, not so much, not really
추천하다 = to recommend
